name: pingouin-psych-stats
description: Small Pingouin workflows for psychology statistics, validation, APA-style reporting, and safer code generation.

interface.shortDescription: Safer Pingouin workflows for psychology researchers
interface.longDescription: A local skill plugin (for Claude Code, Codex, and other AI agents) that routes psychology statistics requests into compact Pingouin workflows: data screening, t tests, ANOVA, correlations, regression, mediation, non-parametric tests, contingency/chi-square tests, Bayesian tests, reliability, power analysis, and APA-style result reporting. It emphasizes assumption checks, correct function selection, reproducible Python snippets, explicit uncertainty, and polished tables instead of ad hoc statistical prose.
defaultPrompt: Use pingouin-stat-router to choose the right analysis.
Run pg-anova for my repeated-measures design.
Use pg-reporting to write APA-style results.
